operation: Start by creating a rectangular base plate with dimensions 40×25×15 on the XY workplane. Perform a union operation with a cylinder of height 12 and radius 8, which is positioned on the top face by applying a transformation offset of (10, 0, 7.5). Finally, select the face facing the positive X-axis, establish a workplane centered on its bounding box, and create a counterbore hole with a 5-unit diameter, a 10-unit counterbore diameter, a counterbore depth of 4, and a total hole depth of 8 units.
geometry: The model consists of a primary rectangular block with a cylindrical protrusion rising from its top surface, positioned closer to one end than the other. On one of the shorter side faces of the rectangular block, there is a centered counterbore hole consisting of a smaller internal diameter and a wider recessed entry.
function: This part is designed as a mounting or alignment block.
